summary: Comprehensive testing of HarborRent Info Menu features (Parking, Login Info, Door Codes, Marketing), Notifications page, and Units page cross-population. All 42 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all new features working correctly.

issues: Level 2/3 sections show 'Enter PIN to view' and Unlock buttons but sensitive accounts not yet created in test

critical_code_review_comments: UnitsPage.js was not routed in App.js - added route /units and sidebar nav item
All data-testid attributes properly implemented across new pages
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed parking spots, decals, notifications during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Info Menu features (Parking, Door Codes, Login Info, Marketing) are working. Notifications page has 5 status tabs (Upcoming, In Progress, Done, Reassigned, Archived). Bell icon notification panel still works with new status model. Units page now shows door code and marketing icons for units with data, with expandable detail sections.

sidebar_navigation.notes: Info menu collapses/expands with 4 sub-items (Parking, Login Info, Door Codes, Marketing). Notifications is standalone top-level item. Units nav item added.

parking_page.notes: 2 tabs working (Parking Info, Tenant Assignments). Create designated spot and Marlins decal working. Tenant assignment dialog functional with tenant select, dates, notes.

notifications_page.notes: 5 status tabs working (Upcoming, In Progress, Done, Reassigned, Archived). Create/edit/delete notifications working. Status change working.

door_codes_page.notes: Property->unit hierarchy working. Set codes for unit working (admin, housekeeping, guest, backup 1, backup 2). Admin code masked with **** and lock icon. PIN settings dialog working.

login_info_page.notes: 3 sensitivity levels displayed (Low/green, Medium/amber, High/red). Add account dialog has all fields. Level 2/3 PIN protection working with Unlock buttons.

marketing_page.notes: Property->unit hierarchy working. Add links for unit working (Airbnb, Furnished Finder, Photos). Copy buttons displayed for each link.

units_page_cross_population.notes: Units with door codes show door icon. Units with marketing links show megaphone icon. Expanding unit row shows door codes section and marketing links section with copy buttons.

bell_icon_panel.notes: Shows Active and Viewed sections. Works with new status-based notification model. Mark Read and Delete buttons functional.

backend_apis.notes: All CRUD operations tested: parking-spots, parking-assignments, door-codes, login-accounts, marketing-links, pins/set/verify/status, team-members, notifications with status management.
